results.title: OReilly Automotive AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
O'Reilly Automotive is making cautious but strategic investments in AI technology, focusing on improving operational efficiency and customer service. While not positioned as an AI leader like some companies, O'Reilly is leveraging AI for inventory management, predictive analytics, and customer experience enhancement[1]. The company has implemented AI-driven tools for demand forecasting, supply chain optimization, and personalized customer experiences[2]. Recent indicators suggest O'Reilly is increasing its technical capabilities, with minimal AI mentions in current job postings but plans to develop more sophisticated customer service and operational solutions[3]. The company's measured approach reflects its focus on practical AI applications that directly support its core aftermarket automotive business.

## AI Initiatives
...
### AI-Driven Inventory Management Optimization
...
Implementation of advanced algorithms for predicting demand and optimizing stock levels across distribution centers
...
Uses AI tools to analyze historical sales data, trends, and regional preferences to ensure warehouses are stocked with the right products in the right quantities, minimizing excess inventory and stockouts
...
### AI-Enabled Routing and Delivery Optimization
...
### Robotics-Driven Distribution Center
...
### Predictive Analytics for Supply Chain Management
...
Implementation of AI for demand forecasting and supply chain optimization
...
Using machine learning algorithms to predict which products are likely to sell well based on historical data, seasonal trends, and regional preferences
...
### Personalized Customer Experience Platform
...
AI system to analyze customer data for personalized product recommendations
...
### Enhanced Training Programs with AI
...
AI-driven simulations and gamified learning experiences for employee training
...
Developing enhanced training programs for employees utilizing AI-driven simulations and gamified learning experiences to improve workforce capabilities
...
How is O'Reilly Automotive using AI in its operations?
...
O'Reilly is implementing AI for inventory management optimization, predictive analytics for demand forecasting, personalized customer experiences, and automated warehouse operations through robotics-driven distribution centers.
...
Recent initiatives include a new robotics-driven distribution center in Georgia with automated storage and retrieval systems, AI-powered inventory optimization, and enhanced employee training programs using AI-driven simulations.
...
What are O'Reilly's AI hiring trends?
...
Current job posting data shows minimal AI mentions (3.7% overall), with higher rates in non-tech roles than technical positions, suggesting early-stage AI integration across the organization.

There is so much uncertainty in the world around us - one of the ways I attempt to take control of my own destiny is to commit to keeping my skills fresh and up-to-date in this rapidly changing space. When I look at what I've accomplished in my career, I want to have no regrets and to be proud of what I've done. That means I have to push myself to be the best that I can be, while also keeping what really matters in sight at all times. I've learned to become my own best advocate, to be relentless in my endeavor to build the best solutions to the problems at hand, and to not take anything for granted.
...

results.title: Lalitha Selvam
highlights:
Director – Data Analytics & Engineering at O’Reilly Auto Parts | Ex-Walmart | Real-Time Data, AI & Cloud Strategy
...
With 20+ years of experience in data engineering, analytics, and technology leadership, I currently serve as Senior Manager – Data Analytics & Engineering at O'Reilly Auto Parts, where I drive strategic data initiatives focused on operational excellence, analytics maturity, and cloud transformation. Prior to this, I led global engineering teams at Walmart Inc., where I architected real-time, low-latency data pipelines, migrated legacy systems to cloud-native platforms, and optimized business intelligence ecosystems. My work delivered measurable impact—including 90%+ cost savings, improved data governance, and accelerated decision-making through AI-ready data systems. I’m passionate about aligning data strategy with business value, enabling organizations to scale through intelligent, data-driven solutions. Areas of Expertise: Cloud Platforms (GCP, Azure) • Enterprise Data Architecture • Real-Time Streaming (Kafka, Spark) BI Platforms (Looker, Tableau, Power BI) • Data Governance & Quality • Agile Delivery & CI/CD Operational Efficiency • Cross-Functional Leadership • Scalable Data Platforms for AI & Analytics

results.title: Renjith Thomas Yohannan
highlights:
Sr Manager Data and Analytics Engineering at O’Reilly Auto Parts | Google Cloud, Azure & Snowflake Certified
...
Sr Manager, Data and Analytics Engineering at [O'Reilly Auto Parts](https://www.linkedin.com/company/o%27reilly-auto-parts)
...
A seasoned Data Engineering professional with over 20 years of experience in building and managing scalable data infrastructure that enables organizations to efficiently process and analyze large and complex data sets. Rich experience in leading cross-functional geographically distributed teams in designing and implementing data solutions that integrates multiple data sources and support various types of data processing and analytics. Experience in range of data technologies and platforms, including cloud-based solutions such as GCP, Azure, as well as traditional Data warehousing solutions. Proven track record and expertise in data architecture, data modeling, ETL processing and data governance and consistently delivering solutions that meet business needs while ensuring data quality and security. Agile trained with strong communication and leadership skills and ability to collaborate with stakeholders at all levels of the organization to align data engineering strategies with business objectives and drive results. ▶ Deep understanding of data architecture principles and ability to design, develop and maintain data pipelines, data models and data storage systems. ▶ Expertise in developing and implementing ETL process to move and transform data from various sources into Datawarehouse/Data lakes. ▶ Ability to integrate data from different sources, including databases, APIs, and file systems and to create solutions that ensure data quality and consistency. ▶ Familiarity with cloud-based technologies and platforms such as GCP, Azure, Snowflake and experience in implementing solutions that leverage these platforms. ▶ Experience in leading cross-functional teams and managing data engineering projects, including setting priorities, managing resources, and delivering results on time and within budget. ▶ Knowledge of best practices for data governance and security including access control, data masking and data encryption. ▶ Passionate about leveraging emerging technologies to improve data engineering practices and deliver solutions that align with business objectives. ▶ Proficiency in Agile methodologies such as Scrum and experience in implementing Agile practices in software development and project management. ▶ Strong communication and collaboration skills with the ability to work effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders, and to facilitate collaboration between team members to ensure successful delivery.

results.title: Justin Broaddus
highlights:
Data Engineer I at [O'Reilly Auto Parts](https://www.linkedin.com/company/o%27reilly-auto-parts)
...
### [O'Reilly Auto Parts](https://www.linkedin.com/company/o%27reilly-auto-parts)
...
#### Data Engineer I (Current)
...
Meet and communicate with various departments (Data Science, business operations, IT) to understand their data needs. Analyze new data structures to correctly profile the data in its source and craft the correct DDL to ensure that the target table is correctly configured to receive it. Build and maintain complex data pipelines that extract, transform, and load data from disparate internal and external sources and populate them in our internal database (IIAS) or Google Cloud (BigQuery) using Informatica Cloud, Python, and SQL. Develop and validate SQL statements to deliver meaningful and accurate data for our business stakeholders and IT management. Provide data solutions to our business stakeholders in our current enterprise business intelligence tool (Domo) to meet the needs of our business stakeholders, using the various connection and transformation tools the platform has available. Identify areas of Domo that can be optimized to prevent excess traffic on our internal database. Work with business stakeholders and Data Strategy management to remove unused or unutilized Domo DataSets and optimize the update schedules for over 500 Workbench jobs. Provide regular support to ensure that our business stakeholders have access to the Domo DataSets they regularly use to make business decisions. Developed the data pipeline that enabled O’Reilly Auto Parts to deliver loyalty rewards strictly through electronic delivery methods and cease sending coupons via mail. Developed feature stores and data libraries to support our Data Science team. Show less

AI/ML Engineer @ Walmart | Designing AI Pipelines, Generative AI, Machine Learning, MLOps, Large Language Models (LLM), Python, PySpark, MLflow
...
AI/ML Engineer with 5 years of experience building scalable machine learning and Generative AI solutions across automotive, healthcare, and financial domains. I specialize in real-time ML systems, predictive analytics, and LLM-powered applications, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and AI assistants that automate complex business workflows. My work focuses on turning large-scale data into production-ready AI systems that improve efficiency and decision-making. Core expertise: • Generative AI (LLMs, RAG, Prompt Engineering, LangChain) • Machine Learning (XGBoost, LSTM, NLP, Forecasting) • Data Engineering (Spark, PySpark, Databricks, Kafka) • MLOps (Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, CI/CD) • Cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP) Key impact: • Built real-time ML systems with sub-25ms latency • Reduced downtime by 15% using predictive models • Improved forecasting accuracy by 20% Interested in roles in AI/ML Engineering, Generative AI, and MLOps. Open to connecting with professionals working on impactful AI systems.

results.title: Eddie Dunn
highlights:
Platform Engineer at [O'Reilly Auto Parts](https://www.linkedin.com/company/o%27reilly-auto-parts)
...
I'm a software engineer with 15+ years building production systems. In my current role at O'Reilly Auto Parts, I build developer enablement SaaS at Fortune 500 scale — an integrated platform of full-stack web applications, internal API libraries, and Python tooling that engineering and operations teams use daily. I'm comfortable in regulated environments (SOX, fintech), owning feature lifecycles end-to-end, and shipping in small continuous increments. I lean on instrumentation, safe rollout patterns, and clear documentation. Open source / personal work: • grind — multi-agent orchestration framework (Python, MIT license, 13K+ lines) • aegis — AI API security proxy with prompt injection detection and PII pseudonymization Background: MS Computer Science from UNC Wilmington. Published research in Bayesian statistics and computational NLP. Taught Linux Administration, Cloud Computing, and Business Application Development as adjunct lecturer (10+ years). Wilmington, NC based. Open to remote roles or hybrid within reasonable drive — RTP, Charlotte, Charleston, Norfolk, Richmond.
...
### Platform Engineer at [O'Reilly Auto Parts](https://www.linkedin.com/company/o%27reilly-auto-parts) (Current)
...
Build and own an integrated developer enablement platform at Fortune 500 scale. Core products:
...
- Deployment & compliance dashboard (React/Vite + Java) — ingests Bitbucket Cloud webhook events, enforces SOX management approval gates for production deploys, triggers Ansible Automation Platform runs, and surfaces logs to developers and compliance reviewers.
...
- Shared Jenkins pipeline library (Groovy/Python) — internal API for development teams; reduces developer Jenkinsfiles to under 10 lines. Adopted across Spring Boot teams.
...
- Operations management TUI (Python/Textual) — interactive product for cluster and application provisioning, used by the operations team. Additional production work: FastAPI + PostgreSQL infrastructure config service with reconciliation logic and full auditability; Python multiprocessing rewrite of a production image-processing workflow that eliminated recurring failures. Stack: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, React/Vite, TypeScript, Java, Ansible, Jenkins, Docker, AWS, Linux.
...

...
I am currently the lead solution designer and analyst for the tendering and payment system for O'Reilly Automotive with over 16 billion in revenue that flows through my projects. During my time at O'Reilly I previously worked as the lead solution designer and requirement writer for the Cash Management system from initial project hand off, to redesign, to pilot and debugging. I was also the analyst, designer, and requirements writer for a suite of web based tools that are used to manage data and perform system maintenance tasks for O'Reilly Stores and corporate teams. ## Job description
...
Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
...
As a Software Engineer on the Shopping Ads team, you will be an "AI First" engineer dedicated to solving complex issues using Generative AI . You will design, implement, and launch innovative Large Language Model (LLM) and Machine Learning (ML) systems to enhance the shopping journey for users worldwide.
...
